images.caption: Figure 1.The framework ofCodeAnchor: Offline static analysis (PyCG call graphs + AST extractors) generates structured tags encoding call/inheritance/data-flow relationships, which are injected into source files as plain-text comments. At runtime, the grep-first agent retrieves code with embedded tags, enabling structure-guided navigation without changing the agent loop.

Figure 2.Motivating example: pure grep-style keyword search is lexical and noisy, while inline CodeAnchor tags surface structured breadcrumbs (e.g., callers/callees and next-file hints) to guide navigation.
Figure 3.Target-file hit probability over steps (RQ3). CodeAnchor tags sustain higher early hit rates on both datasets.
